_doc: A/B scorecard — Game Plan 1A (intraday-momentum / morning_sign gate). PROPOSE-ONLY (Rule 9): no live doctrine/params changed. Raw evidence: morning-sign-gate.json (baseline detector) + morning-sign-gate-allstreams.json (family cross-check). Generator: backtest/autoresearch/validate_morning_sign_gate.py.
title: Gate BEARISH_REJECTION continuation entries to DOWN-morning days only (morning_sign)
rationale: Gao-Han-Li-Zhou (JFE 2018) Market Intraday Momentum: first-30min SPY return predicts last-30min, bearish when morning is red. On real-fills, gating the confirmed BEARISH_REJECTION_MORNING detector to fire only on DOWN-morning days flips ATM expectancy from -$21.58 to +$22.83/contract (WR 63.8%->76.2%); the inverse (UP-morning) arm is sharply NEGATIVE (-$90.66), so the effect is signal, not noise.
_a_b_runs_section: Both arms are PARTITIONS of ONE real-fills universe (same simulate_trade_real run over the same OPRA contracts + ribbon series), differing ONLY by the morning_sign filter. data_hash therefore identical by construction. old = ungated (all sign-known days), new = DOWN-morning days only.
_metrics_section: Real-fills (simulator_real over OPRA, the WR/expectancy AUTHORITY), BEARISH_REJECTION_MORNING detector, puts, chart-stop only (premium_stop_pct=-0.99). Headline = ATM (J's anchor strike class). n_trades is RAW fills (pre-dedup). Note n DROPS by design (the gate removes up-morning trades) — 'more_data_better' direction flags that the win comes from fewer-but-better trades, not more.

itm2_metrics._note: ITM2 = the Gamma-Bold strike class. Same direction, weaker absolute (gate moves it from clearly-negative to ~breakeven).

_inverse_cross_check_section: The CRITICAL signal-vs-noise test. If the DOWN gate were base-rate luck, the UP arm would look similar. It does the OPPOSITE — UP-morning bearish entries are the LOSERS — which is exactly the Gao et al. mechanism (down-morning -> down-afternoon continuation).
dominates_reason: DOWN-gate beats baseline on expectancy, WR, total P&L, and DSR, and ties on anchor edge_capture — but n_trades drops (intended) and the win is NOT statistically significant (DSR 0.44 << 0.95). Real-fills is favorable but the anchor sample is THIN (only 1 of J's 6 anchor days, 4/29, produced a BEARISH_REJECTION_MORNING real-fill; 5/01 & 5/04 winners did not fire this detector at all), so the OP-16 'no-regression' tie is on n=1.
_sub_window_stability_section: Not split into IS/OOS halves in this pass — the gated ATM arm is n=42 over 18 distinct days across the full window, already near the floor for a stable split. The morning_sign coverage (134 DOWN / 174 UP / 12 FLAT days over 320) shows the gate is well-populated, not a rare-regime artefact. A formal IS/OOS split is the recommended next step before any ratification.
_family_scope_section: Scope discipline (lessons C22/C29: gates don't transfer across detectors). The morning_sign gate is SPECIFIC to the rejection/continuation structure — it does NOT generalize across the bearish family. See morning-sign-gate-allstreams.json.

family_cross_check.BEARISH_REJECTION_MORNING: HELPS (ATM exp -21.58 -> +22.83; inverse -90.66). The confirmed edge — clean, in-power (n_obs 42, low_power False).
family_cross_check.HEAD_AND_SHOULDERS_BEAR: DIRECTIONALLY-HELPS-BUT-TINY-N (ITM2 -132.2 -> -47.66, inverse -206.17) — n_obs 7-8, low_power True; advisory only, do not act on alone.
family_cross_check.LEVEL_BREAK_FIRST_STRIKE: HURTS / CONTRADICTS — DOWN-gate WORSENS it (ATM +1.71 -> -19.49) and the UP arm is the profitable one (+33.49). Its fills cluster in UP-mornings; the gate is the WRONG sign for this detector. This is the counter-example proving morning_sign is structure-specific, not a universal bearish filter.
family_cross_check.BEARISH_REVERSAL_AT_LEVEL: WASH — countertrend contrast, n_obs 3-4, no signal.

_acceptance_section: Auto-ratification gate. Fails closed. This does NOT auto-ratify: DSR is far below 0.95 (not significant) and the anchor preservation is on n=1. Propose-only deliverable.
_verdict_note: PROMISING / NEEDS-MORE. Real-fills favorable + inverse confirms signal + anchor no-regression, but not statistically significant (DSR 0.44), thin anchor coverage, AND a partial-causality caveat (see causality_caveat). SHIP-WORTHY as evidence/WATCH; NOT ship-worthy as an auto-applied live gate. Recommend: (1) re-define morning_sign at a checkpoint <= the entry bar to make the gate fully causal, then re-run, (2) formal IS/OOS sub-window split, (3) re-test as J accrues more BEARISH_REJECTION live trades, (4) if adopted, scope STRICTLY to BEARISH_REJECTION continuation — NOT LEVEL_BREAK_FIRST_STRIKE (opposite sign).

causality_caveat._doc: Honest no-look-ahead audit (lesson C6). morning_sign is final only at the 10:00 ET bar close, but BEARISH_REJECTION_MORNING can trigger as early as 09:35 ET (entry on the next bar).
causality_caveat.impact: For ~19% of signals the gate as-defined peeks slightly ahead (morning_sign not yet final at entry). The headline numbers therefore SLIGHTLY overstate a strictly-causal gate. The effect direction is very likely real (the inverse-arm cross-check + the 81% clean majority both hold), but a fully causal live gate MUST compute morning_sign from a checkpoint at-or-before the entry bar (e.g. open->09:35 for the earliest entries, or simply restrict the gate to entries at/after 10:00 ET). This is a research caveat, not a live change.

trigger_observation: docs/WEEKEND-RESEARCH-GAMEPLANS-2026-06-19.md Game Plan 1: Gao-Han-Li-Zhou (JFE 2018) Market Intraday Momentum. Backtest on SPY 5m through 2026-06-16: morning_sign=DOWN gate on BEARISH_REJECTION_MORNING real-fills flips ATM exp -21.58 -> +22.83/contract; inverse UP arm -90.66 confirms signal.

op20_disclosures.authority: Real-fills (simulator_real, OPRA valid ~through 2026-05-29) is the WR/expectancy authority. Arms partition ONE fill set, so deltas isolate the gate (no re-sim noise).
op20_disclosures.levels: Historically-rebuilt star-2 proxies (active+multi_day _detect_from_history), NOT production star-3 named levels. No look-ahead (ctx.prior_bars <= current bar).
op20_disclosures.morning_sign: sign(open[first RTH bar] -> close[last bar <=10:00 ET]). Causal: known by 10:00 ET, before the bearish-continuation entries it gates (which fire 09:35-12:00). FLAT/None-sign days excluded from all arms.
op20_disclosures.dsr: Advisory; Deflated Sharpe via lib/validation. n_obs 42 (in-power) but DSR 0.44 < 0.95 significance line — directional, not significant (lesson C24: do not over-read small-sample stats).
op20_disclosures.chart_stop: premium_stop_pct=-0.99 (chart-stop only) per L51/L55. Puts, qty=3, ATM + ITM2.
